title: Legal Database
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"7n1jd","text":"Legal Database presents the steps to develop a comprehensive archive of legal assets required for open science projects rule of law (RoL) regulatory compliance.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"beleo","text":"Follow the steps archiving the researched materials in your preferred open file format.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cl1g5","text":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Library_and_information_science","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":61}],"data":{}},{"key":"5k6lt","text":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Open_file_format","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":0,"length":46}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"73B1A63D581C11F0BAB90A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Library_and_information_science"}},"1":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"6CC17603581C11F0B1B50A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Open_file_format"}}}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"2imo1","text":"Make sure you have a proper open science and library information science (LIS) methodology. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"d4o6v","text":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Library_and_information_science","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":61}],"data":{}},{"key":"84qtp","text":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Open_science","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":0,"length":42}],"data":{}},{"key":"aipac","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4fgl1","text":"If you have none, you may consider using the Rule of Law Open Science (RoLOS) Protocol [https://dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.81wgbzom3gpk/v1] and Open Heritage Documentation GitBook [https://dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.6qpvrq5yblmk/v1].","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":86,"length":1},{"style":"bold","offset":185,"length":2}],"entityRanges":[{"key":2,"offset":88,"length":56},{"key":3,"offset":187,"length":56}],"data":{}},{"key":"be7ff","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"73B1A63D581C11F0BAB90A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Library_and_information_science"}},"1":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"A0D367CB581C11F0B1B50A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Open_science"}},"2":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"C6378A58581C11F0B1B50A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.81wgbzom3gpk/v1"}},"3":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"FD05E0B0581C11F0BAB90A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.6qpvrq5yblmk/v1"}}}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"8psf3","text":"Licensed under Nonviolent Nonprofit Open Education License (NNOEL)[https://dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bp2l6zkbzgqe/v1)].","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":67,"length":57}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"B2DA4D98581C11F0BAB90A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bp2l6zkbzgqe/v1)."}}}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"6jjjp","text":"Legal documents such as:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"etda3","text":"- Governmental Constitutions.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"57iak","text":"- Governs Statutes.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2bg1r","text":"- Rule of Law (RoL) Legislations.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fq971","text":"- Public International Law (PIL) Inter-Governmental Organizations (IGOs) Recommendations.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2f2ln","text":"- Non-Governmental Organizations (NGOs) By-Laws Charters and Policies.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5m5na","text":"- Civil Movements Legal Manifestos.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fvq11","text":"- Precedent Cases Jurisprudence Analyses.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: International Non-Governmental Organizations (INGOs) and National Non-Governmental Organizations (NGOs) that overview, observe, and establish standards for the area. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/International_non-governmental_organization https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Non-governmental_organization

Public International Law (PIL) Juridical Recommendations from the most respected international organizations including, at least the United Nations (UN) 'Universal Declaration of the Human Rights (UDHR)' and the International Council of the Red Cross (ICRC) 'International Humanitarian Law' and the Sphere Association 'Sphere Humanitarian Standards'. https://en.wikibooks.org/wiki/Public_International_Law https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Universal_Declaration_of_Human_Rights https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/International_humanitarian_law https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Sphere_Handbook This Will Require an Open Source License so that you may consider using the Nonviolent Nonprofit Open Education License(NNOEL). Nonviolent Nonprofit Open Education License (NNOEL) by Felipe Ribeiro

Inter-Governmental Organizations (IGOs) that regulate the local juridical jurisdiction enforcement, implementation, and development of the rule of law (RoL). https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/International_governmental_organization https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rule_of_law https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jurisdiction
Local Government Constitutional Statutory Legislations concerning the theme. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Constitution https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Statute https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Legislation
Precedent Cases Jurisprudences both in local and international juridictions, in favor and against the cause. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Precedent https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jurisprudence

Constitution Building Best Practices from the most compliant and respected organizations in compliance with, at least, the ConstitutionNet open standards. https://idea.int/theme/constitution-building https://constitutionnet.org
Open Justice Policymaking initiatives and best practices. https://edx.org/learn/justice/new-york-university-open-justice https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Policymaking

Diamond Open Access Publication including that of open educational resources (OER). https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Open_access https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Diamond_open_access https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Open_educational_resources
creator: Felipe Ribeiro
